findings.title: daily-briefing sequential stateGroupRef.get() in for-of loop
findings.evidence: for (const [state, items] of curatedStateNews) { ... const stateGroupSnap = await stateGroupRef.get(); ... }
findings.impact: Up to 28 sequential round-trips per cron run (~0.8-1.4s added wall-time). Cron-only.
findings.fix: Use db.getAll(...refs) or Promise.all over the existence checks.
findings.repro: Trigger /api/jobs/daily-briefing with seed of 28 states in curatedStateNews; log duration.

findings.title: ai-community-agent sequential userRef.get() per persona
findings.evidence: for (const persona of personas) { ... const userSnap = await userRef.get(); ... }
findings.impact: Scales with persona pool size; cron-only.

findings.title: readFileSync in /api/seo/llms* request handlers
findings.impact: Blocks event loop per request; bot-driven traffic can spike.
findings.fix: Read once at module init or use fs.promises.readFile.

findings.title: Hot AI routes lack explicit maxDuration export
findings.impact: Silent 504 if Cloud Run instance timeout is dropped below long-tail of these handlers.
findings.fix: Add export const maxDuration = 60 (or 90 for exam-paper, video-storyteller) to each.

findings.title: Sidecar cold-start not yet measured / min-instances unverified
findings.impact: First request after idle may exceed budget; static audit cannot confirm.
findings.fix: Probe: idle 5min → hit /health → measure TTFB. Run gcloud run services describe to check minScale.

findings.title: Live 50 RPS latency probe not run this pass
findings.impact: P1 regression claims cannot be made without baseline numbers.
findings.fix: Run hey -z 60s -c 50 against each canary agent URL with App Check token; capture p50/p95/p99.

findings.title: TTS chunk parallelism via Promise.all confirmed
findings.note: Structural confirmation only; live <5s p95 for 2000-char input still needs probe.
